title: IoT Design Flow for Smart Home Automation
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step design process, key components, and data flow in a typical IoT-based home automation system.
elements: User Input/Trigger (e.g., smartphone app, voice command, motion sensor)
Central Hub/Gateway (e.g., Smart Speaker, Home Assistant)
Connected Devices/Actuators (e.g., Smart Light, Thermostat, Smart Lock)
relationships: User sends a command via an interface to the Hub
Hub processes the command and relays it to the Cloud for interpretation
Cloud sends an execution instruction back to the Hub
Hub activates the specific connected Device to perform the action
Device sends status confirmation back through the Hub to the Cloud and finally to the User

visuals.title: Case Studies Illustrating Iot Design Home Automati
visuals.description: Smart Home IoT Layout - covering room-by-room sensors and actuators, central Raspberry Pi hub, cloud platform integration, and communication protocols
